raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.6":"The delegation asks to look at a paragraph, which most directly invokes sentence- and paragraph-level readability, flow, and polish.","RX.1":"Any projection should preserve uncertainty because the delegation is underspecified and does not specify a review type.","RX.2":"The artifact contains strong scientific claims, so avoiding projected responsibilities beyond the request is necessary.","RX.3":"The agent must stay within projection rather than performing an actual review or edit of the paragraph.","RX.4":"The artifact includes downstream scientific-use recommendations, so the projection must account for avoiding harmful overextension of responsibility.","RX.5":"The projection should remain traceable to the delegation wording and the paragraph-level artifact."}}

rationale.R1.6: The delegation asks to look at a paragraph, which most directly invokes sentence- and paragraph-level readability, flow, and polish.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection should preserve uncertainty because the delegation is underspecified and does not specify a review type.
rationale.RX.2: The artifact contains strong scientific claims, so avoiding projected responsibilities beyond the request is necessary.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within projection rather than performing an actual review or edit of the paragraph.
rationale.RX.4: The artifact includes downstream scientific-use recommendations, so the projection must account for avoiding harmful overextension of responsibility.
rationale.RX.5: The projection should remain traceable to the delegation wording and the paragraph-level artifact.
